_note: Copy this file to validation-commands.json and customize for your repos.
_note_repo_key: Each top-level key is a repository name (gitRepo on the ticket).
_note_worktreeBase: Optional base path to worktree directories. Defaults to process.cwd() if omitted.
_note_checks: Array of checks. Each check has: name (string) and cmd (string).
_note_worktree_placeholder: Use {worktree} in cmd — it is replaced with %WORKTREE_DIR% (Windows) or $WORKTREE_DIR (Unix).
_note_security: Validation commands run with Ralph's privileges. Review command config during code review.
_note_platform_windows: On Windows, commands run via cmd.exe. Use %VAR% for environment variables.
_note_platform_unix: On Unix, commands run via sh/bash. Use $VAR for environment variables.
_note_example_repo: Example configuration for 'my-repo' below. Replace with your actual repository names.
